playbook.intent: 30-min prospect call: walk in with a hypothesis, walk out with enough signal to draft a proposal OR a clean disqualify. Done = call notes saved, fit score recorded, next-step email sent within 24h.
playbook.scope: 30-min prospect call: walk in with a hypothesis, walk out with enough signal to draft a proposal OR a clean disqualify. Done = call notes saved, fit score recorded, next-step email sent within 24h.

success-criteria.criterion: Run stage complete: Live call recording / notes
Capture stage complete: Call notes file

stage.name: Prep
stage.intent: Walk into the call with hypothesis, agenda, and disqualifiers.

tasks.task: Draft an agenda with explicit disqualifiers

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with prep notes in writing. Winging it bias kills signal.

stage.name: Run
stage.intent: Run a 30-min call: listen, capture signal, avoid pitching.

tasks.task: Open with prospect's context, not yours
Use Mom Test questions; avoid yes/no leading

stage.decision-gate: Call closes only when next step is verbally agreed.

stage.name: Capture
stage.intent: Save notes, score fit, send next-step within 24h.

tasks.task: Send next-step email with proposal/decline within 24h

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when fit score recorded + next-step sent.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content discovery-call-prep-run-capture --format md, agent: faion get-content discovery-call-prep-run-capture --format context, json: faion get-content discovery-call-prep-run-capture --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
